backend/main.mo: Defines an empty Motoko actor with no public methods, serving as a placeholder backend canister.
feature_evidence.json: Maps each product feature (home page, game board, single/two player modes, scoreboard, dark theme) to their implementing source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-line descriptions of each frontend source file, summarizing their roles in styling, game logic, UI components, and routing.
frontend/index.css: Defines Tailwind base imports and OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point titled 'Ultimate Tic Tac Toe' that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with three routes: Home (/), SinglePlayer (/single-player), and TwoPlayer (/two-player).
frontend/src/components/GameBoard.tsx: Renders the 3x3 Tic Tac Toe grid with clickable cells, winning cell highlights, a status banner, and a restart button.
frontend/src/components/Scoreboard.tsx: Displays win counts for Player X and Player O with active-player highlighting using neon blue/purple glow effects.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, recreating it when the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameLogic.ts: Custom hook managing Tic Tac Toe game state including board, current player, win/draw detection, winning cell tracking, and reset.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login, logout, and identity state via DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file for React Query hooks; exports nothing since all game state is managed client-side with no backend queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useScoreboard.ts: Custom React hook that manages X and O scores with callbacks to increment individual player scores and reset both scores to zero.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Orbitron/Rajdhani fonts, configures Tailwind with a dark neon-themed design system using oklch color variables, and defines reusable neon glow utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider providers.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page component displaying the game title and two navigation buttons allowing the user to choose between Single Player (vs computer) and Two Player modes.
frontend/src/pages/SinglePlayer.tsx: Single-player game page where the human plays as X and a random-move computer plays as O with a 600ms delay, tracking scores and displaying contextual status messages.
frontend/src/pages/TwoPlayer.tsx: Two-player local game page that alternates turns between Player X and Player O, tracks scores, and displays win/draw/turn status messages.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with Orbitron/Rajdhani fonts, oklch-based neon color palette, neon box-shadow utilities, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state and versioning for an Ultimate Tic Tac Toe React+TypeScript app, documenting all implemented features (home page, game grid, single/two player modes, scoreboard, dark theme) and architectural constraints.
